'''Dorajan''' was a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==History==
[[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] was shot down by [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] over the planet while smuggling [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-issue heavy [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. She crash-landed in its jungles, and was forced to repair her ship with only her [[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droid]], [[SeeVee]]. He was of little assistance, but nevertheless, Okeefe managed to repair her ship and evade the Imperial picket then over the planet.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Better Than Nothing|book=Shadows of the Empire Sourcebook}} {{Mo}}
